channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【From the endpoint to the prompt: a unified data security vision in Cloudflare One】从端点到提示：Cloudflare One 中的统一数据安全愿景
item.description: 【 Cloudflare One unifies data security from endpoint to prompt: RDP clipboard controls, operation-mapped logs, on-device DLP, and Microsoft 365 Copilot scanning via API CASB. 】Cloudflare One 统一了从端点到提示的数据安全性：RDP 剪贴板控件、操作映射日志、设备上 DLP 以及通过 API CASB 进行的 Microsoft 365 Copilot 扫描。

item.title: 【Ending the "silent drop": how Dynamic Path MTU Discovery makes the Cloudflare One Client more resilient】结束“无声丢弃”：动态路径 MTU 发现如何使 Cloudflare One Client 更具弹性
item.description: 【 The Cloudflare One Client now features the ability to actively probe and adjust packet sizes. This update eliminates the problems caused by tunnel layering and MTU differences, providing more stability and resiliency. 】Cloudflare One Client 现在能够主动探测和调整数据包大小。此更新消除了隧道分层和 MTU 差异引起的问题，提供了更高的稳定性和弹性。

item.title: 【How Automatic Return Routing solves IP overlap】自动返回路由如何解决 IP 重叠问题
item.description: 【 Automatic Return Routing (ARR) solves the common enterprise challenge of overlapping private IP addresses by using stateful flow tracking instead of traditional routing tables. This userspace-driven approach ensures return traffic reaches the correct origin tunnel without manual NAT or VRF configuration. 】自动返回路由 (ARR) 通过使用状态流跟踪而不是传统路由表，解决了私有 IP 地址重叠的常见企业挑战。这种用户空间驱动的方法可确保返回流量到达正确的原始隧道，而无需手动 NAT 或 VRF 配置。

item.title: 【A QUICker SASE client: re-building Proxy Mode】QUICker SASE 客户端：重建代理模式
item.description: 【 By transitioning the Cloudflare One Client to use QUIC streams for Proxy Mode, we eliminated the overhead of user-space TCP stacks, resulting in a 2x increase in throughput and significant latency reduction for end users. 】通过将 Cloudflare One Client 转换为使用 QUIC 流进行代理模式，我们消除了用户空间 TCP 堆栈的开销，从而使最终用户的吞吐量增加了 2 倍，并显着减少了延迟。

item.title: 【Always-on detections: eliminating the WAF “log versus block” trade-off】始终在线检测：消除 WAF“日志与块”的权衡
item.description: 【 Cloudflare is introducing Attack Signature Detection and Full-Transaction Detection to provide continuous, high-fidelity security insights without the manual tuning of traditional WAFs. By correlating request payloads with server responses, we can now identify successful exploits and data exfiltration while minimizing false positives. 】Cloudflare 引入了攻击签名检测和全事务检测，以提供持续、高保真的安全洞察，而无需手动调整传统 WAF。通过将请求负载与服务器响应相关联，我们现在可以识别成功的漏洞利用和数据泄露，同时最大限度地减少误报。

item.title: 【Mind the gap: new tools for continuous enforcement from boot to login】注意差距：从启动到登录持续执行的新工具
item.description: 【 Cloudflare’s mandatory authentication and independent MFA protect organizations by ensuring continuous enforcement, from the moment a machine boots until sensitive resources are accessed. 】Cloudflare 的强制身份验证和独立的 MFA 通过确保从计算机启动到访问敏感资源的持续执行来保护组织。

item.title: 【Defeating the deepfake: stopping laptop farms and insider threats】击败深度造假：阻止笔记本电脑农场和内部威胁
item.description: 【 Cloudflare One is partnering with Nametag to combat laptop farms and AI-enhanced identity fraud by requiring identity verification during employee onboarding and via continuous authentication. 】Cloudflare One 正在与 Nametag 合作，通过在员工入职期间要求身份验证和持续身份验证来打击笔记本电脑农场和人工智能增强的身份欺诈。

item.title: 【Stop reacting to breaches and start preventing them with User Risk Scoring】停止对违规行为做出反应，并开始通过用户风险评分来预防违规行为
item.description: 【 Cloudflare One now incorporates dynamic User Risk Scores into Access policies to enable automated, adaptive security responses. This update allows teams to move beyond binary "allow/deny" rules by evaluating continuous behavior signals from both internal and third-party sources. 】Cloudflare One 现在将动态用户风险评分纳入访问策略中，以实现自动化、自适应安全响应。此更新允许团队通过评估来自内部和第三方来源的连续行为信号来超越二元“允许/拒绝”规则。

item.title: 【Moving from license plates to badges: the Gateway Authorization Proxy】从车牌转向徽章：网关授权代理
item.description: 【 Cloudflare’s Gateway Authorization Proxy adds support for identity-aware policies for clientless devices, securing virtual desktops, and guest networks without a device client. 】Cloudflare 的网关授权代理增加了对无客户端设备的身份感知策略的支持，保护虚拟桌面和无需设备客户端的访客网络。

item.title: 【Introducing the 2026 Cloudflare Threat Report】2026 年 Cloudflare 威胁报告简介
item.description: 【 There has been a fundamental shift toward industrialized cyber threats, highlighted by a record 31.4 Tbps DDoS attack and sophisticated session token theft. Our new report examines how nation-states and criminal actors have moved beyond traditional exploits to "living off the XaaS" within legitimate enterprise logic. 】工业化网络威胁已发生根本性转变，其中最突出的是创纪录的 31.4 Tbps DDoS 攻击和复杂的会话令牌盗窃。我们的新报告探讨了民族国家和犯罪分子如何超越传统的利用方式，在合法的企业逻辑中“依靠 XaaS 生存”。
